name: GLM-4.6V
tagline: 106B vision-language model with native multimodal function calling (images/screenshots as tool inputs) and 128K context; MIT license.
metaDescription: GLM-4.6V (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2025-12-08 — part of the GLM-V (vision-language) line. 106B vision-language model with native multimodal function calli…
overview: GLM-4.6V is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM-V (vision-language) line. Released 2025-12-08. Open-weight vision-language models for multimodal reasoning, GUI agents and document/image understanding.

What's notable in this version: 106B vision-language model with native multimodal function calling (images/screenshots as tool inputs) and 128K context; MIT license. A 9B GLM-4.6V-Flash variant ships alongside for local deployment.
